sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MetLife Inc. Stock: Analyst Outperform Ratings and Undervaluation Signal Potential Upside for Invest
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods reinstated an "Outperform" rating on MetLife Inc. shares with an $87 price target, reflecting confidence in the insurer's operational strengths and diversified global footprint. The company's stock shows signs of undervaluation, with an estimated fair value suggesting significant upside from current levels. MetLife's diversified business model across various segments and geographies, coupled with steady analyst support, makes it an attractive prospect for North American investors despite facing interest rate sensitivity and regulatory risks.

feed.title: UPGD Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:UPGD
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the Invesco Bloomberg Analyst Rating Improvers ETF (UPGD), including its current price, key statistics like Assets Under Management (AUM) and expense ratio, and its investment strategy. It covers the fund's historical performance, structure, and how it tracks the Bloomberg ANR Improvers Index by selecting companies with improved analyst consensus ratings. The article also includes frequently asked questions about ETFs and UPGD's specific features.

feed.title: Cognizant Technology Solutions stock hits 52-week low at $58.86
feed.summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) stock reached a 52-week low of $58.86, marking a 22.09% decline over the past year and trading 32% below its 52-week high. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued, offering a 2.17% dividend yield at a P/E ratio of 13.3. The company is actively pursuing strategic initiatives like the Cognizant AI Factory and a partnership with DAMAC Group, while navigating market challenges reflected in reduced price targets from analysts like TD Cowen and BMO Capital.

feed.title: International Paper to build $225M packaging plant in Mississippi
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) is investing $225 million to build a new 468,000-square-foot sustainable packaging facility in Brandon, Mississippi, replacing its existing Richland Container Plant. The new plant, expected to begin operations in late 2027, aims to optimize IP's box plant system, improve reliability and product quality, and strengthen its service capabilities in the mid-South region. This project is expected to create new opportunities and benefit Mississippi's economy.

feed.title: Utility Entergy says revised Meta data-center deal to deliver higher customer savings
feed.summary: Entergy announced a revised agreement with Meta Platforms for its planned data center in northeast Louisiana. The new deal will have Meta pay the full cost of service, leading to nearly $2 billion in additional customer savings over 20 years, building on the initial $650 million. Entergy plans significant infrastructure development, including new power plants and transmission lines, to support the data center's energy demands.

feed.title: Archer Daniels Midland stock hits 52-week high at 73.82 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) stock recently hit a 52-week high of $73.82, reflecting a 55% total return over the past year. The company boasts 51 consecutive years of dividend increases and a 2.88% dividend yield. This performance is attributed to strong demand and resilience in the agricultural commodities market, despite a recent earnings report showing an EPS beat but revenue shortfall.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock After a 20% YTD Drop: Here’s What’s Driving the Valuation
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) stock has seen a significant 20% year-to-date drop due to investor concerns over Medicare Advantage expectations, margin pressures, and a weak 2026 revenue outlook. Despite these challenges, a valuation model suggests the stock could reach $390 per share by December 2028, implying a 45.5% total return, or 14.5% annualized, driven by modest revenue growth, expected margin recovery, and a normalized P/E multiple. The article emphasizes that future performance hinges on improved policy visibility, cleaner earnings execution, and stabilization of earnings and operating margins.

feed.title: SNDK Stock Fortunes Rise with Morgan Stanley’s Positive Outlook
feed.summary: Sandisk Corporation (SNDK) stock is experiencing an uptick, propelled by a positive earnings report and Morgan Stanley's optimistic outlook on the healthy correction in U.S. memory stocks. Influenced by retail investors from WallStreetBets, SNDK's stock price has seen significant boosts, despite some underlying operational challenges indicated by negative profit margins. The article emphasizes the interplay between retail investor sentiment and fundamental market analyses in shaping the company's financial future.

feed.title: Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF Options Spot-On: On March 26th, 217.12K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.07 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On March 26th, the Direxion Daily Semiconductor Bull 3x Shares ETF (SOXL.US) experienced significant options trading activity, with a total volume of 217.12K contracts. Put options constituted 56.45% of transactions, while call options made up 43.55%. The open interest for SOXL reached approximately 1.07 million contracts, representing 105.77% of the 30-day average, indicating substantial ongoing option positions.

feed.title: Vanguard (KEY) amendment shows 0% ownership after Jan 12, 2026 realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership of KeyCorp common stock, amounting to zero shares, following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that this is an administrative reallocation of reporting responsibility, not a sale of shares, and future filings by these disaggregated entities will provide actual institutional positions.

feed.title: Telecom Argentina Stet - France Telecom (NYSE:TEO) Downgraded by Scotiabank to Sector Underperform
feed.summary: Scotiabank has downgraded Telecom Argentina Stet - France Telecom (NYSE:TEO) from "sector perform" to "sector underperform," setting a price target of $8.60, indicating a potential downside of 23.24%. The stock recently traded at $11.20, with a consensus rating of "Reduce" and an average target price of $11.70 from analysts. Telecom Argentina reported negative net margin and return on equity, and several institutional investors have adjusted their positions in the company.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Eversource Energy Price Target to $74 From $80, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $74 from $80, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a recent revision in analyst expectations for the utility company. The article also notes other recent analyst rating changes for Eversource Energy from firms like Mizuho, BMO Capital, JPMorgan, TD Cowen, and Wells Fargo, indicating ongoing re-evaluations of the company's financial outlook.

feed.title: Did RTX’s Expanded Missile Integration Capacity Just Shift RTX's (RTX) Investment Narrative?
feed.summary: RTX's Raytheon unit has expanded its Redstone Missile Integration Facility, increasing missile integration and delivery capacity by over 50%. This expansion, along with Pentagon framework agreements, aims to meet defense demand and strengthens RTX's investment narrative focused on long-term defense spending and growing cash flows from its substantial backlog. However, investors should remain aware of potential risks from shifts in defense budgets away from major hardware.

feed.title: Southern Company Risk Looks Overdone as Policy Fears Fade
feed.summary: Mizuho maintains an "Outperform" rating on Southern Company (SO), believing that fears regarding potential regulatory damage from Alabama's utility legislation are overstated. Discussions

feed.title: Gartner Price Target Lowered to $140 by Wells Fargo as Iran Conflict Rattles Enterprise Spending
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Gartner (IT) to $140, maintaining an Underweight rating due to macro volatility from the Iran conflict and a significant deceleration in contract value growth. The stock has seen a dramatic decline, falling 64.38% over the past year, as enterprise clients pull back on advisory commitments and face competitive pressure from AI alternatives. Despite management's confidence in a 2026 CV acceleration, Wells Fargo's bearish outlook suggests continued challenges for the company.

feed.title: Reasons to Add Cooper Companies Stock to Your Portfolio Now
feed.summary: The Cooper Companies (COO) is recommended as a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) stock due to its market share gains, premium product momentum in CooperVision, and strong margin expansion driven by operational efficiencies and AI adoption. CooperSurgical's growth is also supported by recovery trends in the fertility market. Despite challenges like Asia-Pacific weakness and geopolitical risks, the company's long-term opportunities are strong.

feed.title: Chernett Jorey buys Neuronetics (STIM) shares worth $211,000
feed.summary: Jorey Chernett, a ten percent owner of Neuronetics, Inc. (NASDAQ:STIM), recently purchased 150,000 shares of the company's common stock for a total of $211,000. These purchases occurred on March 25 and 26, 2026, while the stock was trading near its 52-week low. Following these transactions, Chernett directly owns 8,893,276 shares, representing a significant stake in Neuronetics.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics board will lose co-founder and veteran director on May 6
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) announced that co-founder Richard P. Teets, Jr. and veteran director Gabriel L. Shaheen will retire from its Board of Directors effective May 6, 2026, at the company's Annual Meeting. Teets, with over 35 years of industry partnership, will remain a significant shareholder and pursue philanthropic activities, while Shaheen served for over 16 years, providing financial counsel and strategic perspective. The company expressed profound gratitude for their extensive contributions to its culture and growth, assuring investors that this transition aligns with ongoing operational strengths and growth initiatives.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics Thanks Richard P. Teets, Jr. and Gabriel L. Shaheen for their Exemplary Board Service
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. announced the retirements of Richard P. Teets, Jr. and Gabriel L. Shaheen from its Board of Directors, effective May 6, 2026. Mark D. Millett, Chairman and CEO, praised Teets for his foundational role as co-founder and leader, shaping the company's culture and innovation over 35 years. Shaheen was recognized for his invaluable financial acumen and strategic guidance during his sixteen years of service.

feed.title: Tenable Holdings stock hits 52-week low at 17.18 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tenable Holdings (TENB) stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $17.31, a 49% decrease over the past year. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be undervalued with potential upside, and analysts maintain price targets ranging from $19 to $45. Recent positive Q4 2025 results and a new Chief Revenue Officer offer a mixed outlook for the cybersecurity firm.

feed.title: AbbVie touts 5-year arthritis data and late-breaker vitiligo results
feed.summary: AbbVie will present 24 abstracts at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting, showcasing new clinical and real-world evidence for its dermatology portfolio. Key findings include 5-year radiographic nonprogression data for risankizumab in psoriatic arthritis, long-term safety data for upadacitinib in atopic dermatitis, and initial Phase 3 results for upadacitinib in vitiligo and alopecia areata. The company aims to highlight sustained efficacy, long-term safety, and quality-of-life improvements across its immune-mediated skin disease treatments.

feed.title: 10,000 operations leaders gathered in Orlando to tackle downtime and safety
feed.summary: Grainger recently convened over 10,000 customers, suppliers, and industry leaders at its biennial Grainger Show in Orlando to address operational challenges like downtime, inventory control, and safety. The event featured seminars, hands-on demonstrations, and recognized top-performing suppliers with "Partners in Performance" awards. This gathering highlights Grainger's commitment to providing practical solutions and strategic insights to help customers improve efficiency and reliability.

feed.title: GRAINGER SHOW BRINGS TOGETHER MORE THAN 10,000 MRO LEADERS TO HELP CUSTOMERS SOLVE OPERATIONAL CHALLENGES AND EMBRACE INNOVATIONS SHAPING INDUSTRY'S FUTURE
feed.summary: Grainger recently hosted its biennial Grainger Show in Orlando, Florida, gathering over 10,000 MRO leaders, customers, and suppliers. The event focused on addressing operational challenges, strengthening supply chains, and exploring innovations in the MRO industry, including AI-driven insights. Grainger also recognized top-performing suppliers with its "Partners in Performance" awards, with Klein Tools named "Supplier of the Year."

feed.title: Why Palo Alto Networks May Hit a $261 Price Target: The AI Security Platformlate V2
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) is strategically positioning itself as a leading AI security platform, moving beyond fragmented solutions to an integrated ecosystem. Through significant acquisitions like CyberArk and Chronosphere, coupled with strong organic growth in its Next-Generation Security offerings, the company is building a comprehensive security fabric spanning identity, observability, networks, and endpoints. The TIKR Advanced Model projects a $261.56 price target by 2030, driven by sustained top-line growth and a robust profitability profile, offering a compelling annualized return for investors.

feed.title: Newmont Corp Stock: Navigating Gold Production Trough and Strong Financials in 2026 Proxy Highlights
feed.summary: Newmont Corp is projected to experience a production trough in 2026, with gold output estimated at 5.3 million ounces, a 10% decline from previous levels. Despite this, the company reported strong financial results for 2025, including record free cash flow and significant debt reduction, with analysts maintaining positive outlooks and institutional investors increasing their stakes. This positions Newmont as a valuable holding for North American investors seeking precious metals exposure and long-term stability.
